response.justification: Exceptional candidate with 12+ years full-stack experience and a current role at re:cinq as Staff Engineer building full-stack features with AI-agent infrastructure—directly aligned with the position. Strong foundation across TypeScript, Node.js, testing, and cloud platforms. Primary concerns are the absence of explicit Nest.js and limited React visibility (Ember.js more prominent in background), which are framework-specific gaps worth validating in conversation.
strengths: Current Staff role at re:cinq demonstrates exact position fit: full-stack development with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generator experience
Exceeds seniority requirement with 12+ years proven full-stack expertise across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems with strong TypeScript and Node.js foundation
Demonstrated testing excellence and infrastructure knowledge: TDD practitioner, CI/CD setup, Docker/Kubernetes proficiency, AWS CDK experience
concerns: Nest.js not mentioned despite being primary stack requirement; unclear if hands-on experience exists with the framework
React experience appears limited with only one mention at Optilyz; Ember.js is the more prominent frontend framework in work history
Python and PostgreSQL not listed in skills despite being required language proficiency and database requirement; specific testing frameworks (Jest, Vitest, Playwright) not explicitly mentioned
